query: Did the chest X-ray show anything?
label: cold_P5.8
answer:
Hi Soham,
Your last cholesterol reading (April 5, 2026):

Total Cholesterol: 237 mg/dL (higher than ideal)
LDL: 162 mg/dL (the "bad" cholesterol — elevated)
HDL: 38 mg/dL (the "good" cholesterol — too low)
Triglycerides: 186 mg/dL (elevated)

These numbers show your cholesterol needs attention. Your doctor has referred you to a cardiologist, which is the right step.
Your chest X-ray (January 8, 2026):
The scan was normal — no active heart or lung problems were found. That's good news.
However, keep in mind that you also have:

Stage 1 hypertension (blood pressure 138/88)
Prediabetes (HbA1c 6.1%)
Mild asthma (from your spirometry test in March)

These conditions work together, so managing them all — through diet, exercise, and your current medications — is important.
Not medical advice — talk to your doctor before acting on this.
